titles.title: He's Got the Whole World in His Hands

authors.author: Spiritual
Spiritual
Er hält die ganze Welt in seiner Hand

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's got the whole world in His hands, (X4)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's got the wind and the rain in His hands, (X3) He's got the whole world in His hands.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's got the little bitty babies in His hands, (X3) He's got the whole world in His hands.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's got you and me and brother in His hands, (X3) He's got the whole world in His hands.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He's got you and me and sister in His hands, (X3) He's got the whole world in His hands.
